title: Chester P for Mayor: Hip-Hop, Homelessness and the Housing Crisis
original_title: Chester P for Mayor: Hip-Hop, Homelessness and the Housing Crisis
overview: Chester P (Real talk records) takes a film crew with him on a journey as he attempts to find the truth about the effects of the austerity measures and the housing crisis on the people of London with a moving and insightful narrative.
